headline: Flexera is Only Vendor Named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Software Asset Management Tools Report
summary: This distinction is based on feedback and ratings from end-user professionals, grounded in real-world experienceITASCA, Ill., July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Flexera, a global leader in technology spend and risk intelligence, today announced it has been recognized as a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Software Asset Management Tools. headline: Vitria Technology Sets the Standard for Event Intelligence Solutions as Knowledge-Driven AIOps Reaches the Enterprise Mainstream
summary: Vitria Technology, the company behind the VIA AIOps platform, today reinforced its leadership in Event Intelligence Solutions (EIS) — the category of AI-driven platforms that correlate, reason over, and resolve IT and network events in real time. Vitria has been named a Sample Vendor for Event Intelligence Solutions in seven Gartner Hype Cycle reports published in 2026, a breadth of inclusion that spans AI, IT operations, infrastructure, service management, and site reliability engineering.

headline: SoundHound AI (SOUN) Stock Could Trade At A Premium Despite Gartner Recognition
summary: SoundHound AI stock has delivered a very strong 163.7% return over the past three years, yet its current checks point to a share price that screens as expensive rather than a clear bargain. A 163.7% gain over three years puts SoundHound AI firmly in the high return camp, which raises the bar for what future revenue and cash flow would need to justify today’s price. Recent recognition in Gartner’s 2026 Magic Quadrant and the rollout of the OASYS platform can support higher long term growth...

headline: Why Gartner Stock Swooned in the First Half of 2026
summary: It's hard to compete with increasingly sophisticated AI models.

headline: Datadog (DDOG) Stock Looks Fairly Valued With Sales Still Looking Rich
summary: After a strong three year run for Datadog stock, the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate now sits close to the market price while traditional multiples lean expensive. This leaves investors to judge whether recent gains leave enough room for error at around US$245.77 per share. Datadog has returned 122.1% over the past three years, which puts the current valuation under closer scrutiny after a long stretch of strong performance. Recognition as a Leader in Gartner's...
